titleStmt.title: SII 19.62: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 62. (A.R. No. 605 of 1920.) ON THE SAME WALL.

summary.p: This is incomplete. It records an allotment of lands belonging to the temple, among the members of the establishment in certain proportions according to the emoluments they were till now receiving (in cash), made by Kaṇḍiyūr Dēvaṉ-Dēvaṉ of Bhuvanachūḷāmaṇichchēri the managing officer of the temple (śrīkāryam tiruttugiṉṟa), on an order received from three madhyasthas representing the wards Tribhuvanamahādēvichchēri, Kōdaṇḍarāmachchēri and Vīraśrīkāmukachchēri in the assembly of 120 members holding office of the grāma-kāryam for the year beginning with the Ṛishabha month. This transaction was also ordered to be engraved on the walls of the śrīvimāna. To the names of two madhyasthas is added the expression Peruṅkāvidi indicative of some title which seems to have carried with it the grant of a free-hold land, as seen in the word kāvidikkāṇi found in No. 63 below. This is probably an inscription of Uttama-Chōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesarivarmmarkku yāṇṭu 3Āvatu vaṭakarai brahmadeyam śrīviranārā yaṇaccaturvvedimaṅgalattu tiruvanan=teśvarattu paramasvāmi śrīkāryyan=tiruttukiṉṟa bhuvanacūḷāmaṇicceri kaṇṭiyūr tevaṉ tev(ā)ṉeṉ Eṉṉai Ivvāṇṭu ṛṣabhanāyaṟumutal samvatsaram grāmakāryyantiruttukiṉṟa 100 2 10var perumakkaḷil paramasvāmiyai Abhiṣekañ ceyvārkkum paricarikkum māṇikaḷukkum Istānamuṭaiya śivabrāhmaṇar- kkum śrībalikoṭṭu muvaccarkkum tirumeykāppārkkun tiruvalakiṭṭu tirumeḻukkiṭuvārkkum tirunan=tavāṉa miṟaikkuṅ kuṭikaḷukkum maṟṟu mepperppaṭṭārum vevveṟu vaccaṟpaṭi peṟa Uṭaiyārkku Avvavar peṟum paṭikkut takkavāṟu devaruṭaiya nilaṅkaḷile
y tribhuvanamahādeviccer madhyasthan tiruveḷḷaṟaip peruṅkāvitiyum śrīkodaṇḍarāmacceri madhyasthan vāṉavaṉmahādevip peruṅ(ruṅ)kāvitiyum Eḻuttiṉāl nilanivan=tamaṭaittu candrādityavat niṟpataṟku śilālekhaiyāka śrīvimānattiley veṭṭuvittuk kāṇi ceytukuṭukkaveṉṟu viraśrīkāmukacceri madhyasthan Alaṅkārottamaṉākiya kūttaṉeḻut tiṉāl śrīmukan=tara nāṉiśrīmukappaṭi tiruveḷḷaṟaip peruṅkāvitiyaiyum vāṉavaṉ mātevip peruṅkāvitiyaiyum vaiyttivarkaḷ Eḻuttiṉāl devar nilaṅkaḷil nilanivan=ta maṭaittuk kāṇiyākak kallil veṭṭiṉapaṭi sthānamuṭaiya śivabrahmaṇar kauśikaṉ sarvvānmaśivar makaṉ Aiññūṟṟuvabhaṭṭaṉākiya jñānaśivabhaṭṭa(rā)ṉ māsamprati Uṭaiya nāḷ 7- m mivaṉ ṟampi viranāraṇapaṭṭaṉuṭaiya
nāḷ 5- m kāśyapa ṉbhṛkupri yaṉ śrīkaṇṭaṉuṭaiya nāḷ9� m kauśikaṉ kūttaṉ cen=taṉun=tampimārumuṭaiya nāḷ3�2 mbhāradvāji Iḷaiyāṉ parameśvara ṉstrīdhana- muṭaiya nāḷ 3�2 m kāppiyaṉ tiruvāḷaṉ paṭṭālakaṉuṭaiya nāḷ1�2 māka Ivarkaḷip paricuṭaiya nāḷāliśrīkoyil kūttapperumāḷaiyumṛṣabhavāha napperumāḷaiyum mutalāka maṟṟumuḷḷa tirumeṉikaḷaiyellāmarcci ppāṉoruvaṉu mivvakai paricarippā ṉoruvaṉum taṭuvā ṉoruvaṉum ttu tiruvamitu kāṭṭuvā ṉoruvaṉumśrībali kku viḷakkumdhū pamum piṭippā ṉoruvaṉum parikalaṅkaḷ māṟṟip pūcakkaṭavā ṉoruvaṉumāka Ippaṇikaḷ ceytuṭaiyā raṟuvarkku makappaṭa mutaleṟṟi nicata morottarkku � Ākiccaṟpaṭi1- māka tuThe continuation is probably lost.
Digital edition of SII 19.62 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
